notifications.title: Web Portal is Opened for Registration of April/ May 2026 Examinations. Institutions are instructed to take a Registration Preview first and Give it to the concerned student for verifying subjects to be registered. Last Date for completing the Registration Process is 13-04-2026(by 5:00 P.M.).

Distance Education:- Web Portal is opened for Downloading the Hall Ticket for Online Mode MBA (Business analytics and General Management) - December 2025 Online Examinations. Candidates can download the Hall Ticket from Student login.[https://coe.annauniv.edu/home/]
Distance Education – Online Mode (MBA): The Web Portal has been opened for registration of the December 2025 End Semester Examinations from 25-03-2026 to 30-03-2026.-Click Here
Distance Education - Online Mode - (MBA) Web Portal is Opened for Registration of December 2025  End Semester Examinations (e-VBAB Network Project Students (Afghanistan and Africa)).-Click Here

Distance Education:- Web Portal is opened for Applying Revaluation of Answer Script(August / September 2025 Examinations) from 25-03-2026 to 30-03-2026 through study centre only. The Web Portal will be closed on 30-03-2026.Click Here
Kind attention to the Institutions / Students :- Notification for issuing of Provisional Certificate and Consolidated Statement of Grades for Regular Students - Reg Click Here

Kind Attention to the Institutions:The results of the Nov./Dec. 2025 Examinations (UG/PG/Ph.D.) have been published.Students who wish to apply for a photocopy of their answer scripts should submit their requests through their respective colleges on or before 24.03.2026 (Tuesday), 5:00 PM.The last date has been extended up to 26.03.2026 (Thursday), 11:00 AM.Click Here

Distance Education: -  Aug./Sep. 2025 Examinations and Special Examinations Results Published. Candidates can apply for Photocopy of Answer Scripts from 10-03-2026 through study centre only. Last Date for applying photocopy of answer script is 15-03-2026. Click Here
